title: cupania livida
intro: Cupania livida is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the yellow cupania or black sapote. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cupania livida include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cupania livida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis.
